notes: Authored from scripts/inspect-pdf-fields.mjs against IRS f14039.pdf (Rev. December 2022). PDF has 72 AcroForm fields organized into Sections A–F with semantic names. Known limitations: (a) taxpayer_name binds to last_name only — schema currently has unsplit names, first_name + middle_initial render empty pending a schema split. (b) address_zip binds to zip_code.first_5 only — the trailing 4 digits aren't separated in our schema. (c) submission_reason and taxpayer_status are single_select strings; their corresponding PDF checkboxes (section_a.q1/q2 for reason, section_f for representative-type) need a multi-select-contains transform that doesn't yet exist — same gap as 433-A's marital_status. (d) Section F (representative info) isn't in the 14039 schema yet, so section_f representative fields stay blank.
